name: G-5 aggregator: _operator/**/*.yaml loads last so operator overrides win per the §17 G-5 ordering
command:
mkdir -p tree/google tree/_operator/my-org && printf 'source:
  id: g
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
' > tree/google/g.yaml && printf 'source:
  id: o
rules:
  - id: my-org-001
' > tree/_operator/my-org/c.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json --emit-load-order 2>err.txt; node -e 'const e=require("fs").readFileSync("err.txt","utf8");const m=e.match(/"load_order":\[([^\]]+)\]/);if(!m)process.exit(1);const arr=m[1];const i_g=arr.indexOf("google");const i_o=arr.indexOf("_operator");process.exit(i_g>=0 && i_o>=0 && i_o>i_g?0:1)' && echo operator_last 1>&2
